brand.targetAudience: Premium, frictionless shopping experience — reduces clutter of traditional e-commerce
brand.mood: Calm, controlled, intentional, quiet, highly efficient

level1.description: Cards — pure white with subtle ambient shadow

level2.description: Modals / Dropdowns — pure white with deeper ambient shadow

primary.note: Hover = subtle shift to lighter navy, never a bright color

card.note: No border — use shadow on hover only

beforeAfterToggle.description: Horizontal slider — swipe between Cluttered and Organized state
beforeAfterToggle.note: Brand-unique component. Use high-contrast lifestyle photography.

designMd:
